text.en: If your Army Faction is **DEATH GUARD,** while an enemy unit is within Contagion Range of one or more **DEATH GUARD** models from your army, it is Afflicted (see below).
CONTAGION RANGE
Contagion Range changes over the course of the battle:
Contagion Range cannot be greater than 12" after modifiers.
Afflicted

During the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of the Plagues below. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy unit is Afflicted, subtract 1 from the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit, and that unit has the effect of your chosen Plague.

*This horrifying affliction sees the minds and senses of the victim gnawed gradually away from within.*

Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

*Limbs shuddering with fever palsy, bones turned brittle as glass, these warriors can barely act to defend themselves.*

Worsen the Save characteristic of models in this unit by 1.

*Victims of this insidious ailment become glassy eyed and morose as their very animus and essence decay.*

Worsen the Move, Leadership, and Objective Control characteristics of models in this unit by 1 (this rule can only worsen a model’s Objective Control characteristic to a minimum of 1).
When mustering your army, unless specifically stated otherwise, you cannot select **PLAGUE LEGIONS** as your Army Faction.
Friendly Maggot Lords Terminator units have Scouts 3".
text.es: Las unidades Exterminador Señores de los Gusanos amigas tienen Avanzadilla 3".
text.fr: Les unités de Terminator des Chevaliers Vers Terminator amies ont Éclaireurs 3".
text.it: Le unità Terminator dei Signori delle Larve amiche hanno Esploratori 3".
text.ja: 味方マゴットロード・ターミネイター・ユニットは斥候3mvを持つ。
text.zh: 己方蛆虫领主终结者单位拥有斥候 3"。

text.en: Friendly Death Guard Character units have +3" to their Contagion Range (to a maximum of 12").
text.de: Befreundete Death-Guard-Charaktermodell-Einheiten haben +3" auf ihre Infektionsreichweite (bis zu einem Maximum von 12").
text.es: Las unidades Personaje Guardia de la Muerte amigas tienen +3" al alcance de detección (hasta un máximo de 12").
text.fr: Les unités de Personnage de la Death Guard amies ont +3" à leur Portée de Contagion (jusqu’à un maximum 12").
text.it: Le unità Personaggio della Death Guard amiche hanno +3" alla Distanza di Contagio (fino a un massimo di 12").
text.ja: 味方デスガード・キャラクター・ユニットの感染範囲は+3mvの修正を受ける（最大12mvまで）。
text.ko: 아군 데스 가드 캐릭터 유닛에 전염 범위 +3"(최대 12"까지)를 부여합니다.
text.zh: 己方死亡守卫角色单位的感染范围增加 3"（最高为 12"）。

text.en: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and a **DEATH GUARD** unit from your army (excluding Battle-shocked units) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase. In addition, until you lose control of that objective marker, it has the Nurgle’s Gift ability as if it were a **DEATH GUARD** model from your army.

While a **PLAGUE LEGIONS** unit from your army is within 7" of one or more **DEATH GUARD** units from your army, that **PLAGUE LEGIONS** unit has the Nurgle’s Gift ability.

While a **DEATH GUARD** unit from your army is within 7" of one or more **PLAGUE LEGIONS** units from your army, add 3" to that **DEATH GUARD** unit’s Contagion Range.

name.fr: Esprits de la Machine Corrompus et Corrodés

text.en:
• Friendly Foetid Bloat‑Drone/Foetid Bloat‑Drone with Heavy Blight Launcher/Helbrute/Myphitic Blight‑Hauler units have Contagion Engine.
  • Friendly CONTAGION ENGINE units’ ranged attacks have [ASSAULT].
This detachment has the ENGINES tag and cannot be taken with another ENGINES detachment.
text.de:
• Befreundete Faulgasdrohne-/Faulgasdrohne-mit-Schwerem-Pestwerfer-/Höllenschlächter-/Myphitische-Seuchenschlepper-Einheiten haben Maschinerie der Fäulnis.
  • Die Fernkampfattacken befreundeter Maschinerie-der-Fäulnis-Einheiten haben [Sturm].
Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Maschinen und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung ­Maschinen gewählt werden.
text.es:
• Las unidades Dron Fétido/Dron Fétido con Lanzaplagas pesado/Bruto Infernal/Cargaplagas Mefítico amigas tienen Ingenio del contagio.
  • Los ataques a distancia de las unidades INGENIO DEL CONTAGIO amigas tienen [ASALTO].
text.fr:
• Les unités de Drone Fétide/Drone Fétide avec Lance-peste Lourd/Métabrutus/Semi-chenillé Méphitique amies ont le mot-clé Machines de Contagion.
  • Les attaques de tir des unités de Machines de Contagion amie ont [ASSAUT].
text.it:
• Le unità di Drone Fetido/Drone Fetido con Lanciagranate del Contagio Pesante/Bruto Infernale/Spargimorbi Mefitico amiche hanno Macchina di Contagio.
  • Gli attacchi da tiro delle unità Macchina di Contagio amiche hanno [Assalto].
  • Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Macchine e non può essere preso con altri distaccamenti Macchine
text.ja:
• 味方フォーティッド・ブロートドローン/フォーティッド・ブロートドローン（ヘヴィ・ブライトランチャー装備）/ヘルブルート/メフィティック・ブライトハウラー・ユニットは感染兵器を持つ。
  • 味方感染兵器・ユニットの射撃攻撃は［アサルト］を持つ。
text.ko:
• 아군 악취 팽창드론/악취 팽창드론·중형 마름병 발사기/헬브루트/독성 마름병 운반기 유닛에 전염 병기를 부여합니다.
  • 아군 전염 병기 유닛의 원거리 공격에 [기동 사격]을 부여합니다.
text.zh:
• 己方恶臭肿胀机兵/装备重型疫病发射器的恶臭肿胀机兵/地狱兽/恶臭疫病引擎单位拥有传瘟机械关键词。
  • 己方传瘟机械单位的远程攻击拥有[突击]。

text.en: In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to two friendly Plague Marines units. Those units have Infiltrators. This detachment has the flyblown tag and cannot be taken with another flyblown detachment.
text.de: Im Schritt „Schlachtformation festlegen“ kannst du bis zu zwei befreundete Seuchenmarine-Einheiten wählen. Jene Einheiten haben Infiltratoren. Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Fliegenplage und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung Fliegenplage gewählt werden.
text.es: En el paso de Declarar formaciones de batalla, puedes elegir hasta 2 unidades Marines de Plaga amigas. Esas unidades tienen Infiltradores.
text.fr: À l’étape Déclarer les Formations de Combat, vous pouvez choisir deux unités Marines de la Peste amies maximum. Ces unités ont Infiltrateurs.
text.it: Nel passo Dichiarare le formazioni di battaglia puoi scegliere fino a due unità di Marines della Peste amiche. Quelle unità hanno Infiltratori.
text.ja: 戦闘陣形の宣言ステップ中、味方プレーグマリーン・ユニットを2個選択できる。選択されたユニットは浸透戦術を持つ。
text.ko: 전투 진형 선언 단계에, 아군 플레이그 마린 유닛을 최대 둘 지정할 수 있습니다. 지정된 유닛에 침투조를 부여합니다.
text.zh: 在宣布战斗编队步骤中，您可以选择最多两个己方瘟疫战士单位。那些单位拥有渗透者技能。

text.en: At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Plagues listed in Nurgle’s Gift. Until the end of the battle, that is your chosen Plague instead of any previously chosen Plague.

At the start of the battle round, select a number of enemy units more than 12" away from every model from your army that is on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle round, those enemy units are Afflicted. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below.
In your Command phase in each of the following battle rounds, depending on your chosen battle size, add a new **POXWALKERS** unit with a Starting Strength of 10 to your army, in Strategic Reserves.

In your opponent’s Command phase, roll 2D6 for each Afflicted enemy unit, subtracting 1 from the result if that unit is Below Half-strength. If the result is 6 or less, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more **PLAGUE LEGIONS** units from your army, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

fluff.en: The daemons of Nurgle grasp their victims tightly with rotting talons and coiling tentacles, their clutch as inescapable as entropy itself.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD** Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

fluff.en: Employing their unique gifts, this champion enhances the weapons of their comrades with even greater levels of infectious malevolence.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD** Attached unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Toughness characteristic of models in your unit.

fluff.en: After their champion calls down the blessings of Nurgle, these warriors can fight on no matter the catastrophic, often gruesome, damage done to them by the foe.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a visible enemy unit (excluding **AIRCRAFT**) within your opponent’s deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Those who languish in misery or cower in terror make themselves easy targets for the Death Guard.

target.en: One **POXWALKERS** unit from your army.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, and add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.

fluff.en: Gripped by a sudden, monstrous hunger, the Poxwalkers surge forward in a ravenous mass.

target.en: One **TERMINATOR** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) you can re-roll the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Swollen with bitter arrogance, these warriors carve a path through their perceived lessers and leave them as worm food.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

fluff.en: Those favoured by Nurgle are inured to pain, their rotting bodies shrugging off all but the most traumatic damage with ease.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD** Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

fluff.en: The vile talents of such plague specialists act like a filth-smeared lens, focusing and intensifying the infectious gifts of Nurgle.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD** model your army that has lost one or more wounds.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within 3" of your model. Roll a number of D6 equal to the number of wounds your model has lost: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers one mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds) and your model regains 1 lost wound (to a maximum of 6 lost wounds).

fluff.en: Billowing from this warrior’s wounds come clouds of parasitic spores that settle on the foe and drain their vitality, stealing it for the one who spawned them.

target.en: One **TERMINATOR** unit from your army.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models in your unit.

fluff.en: Death Guard warriors know to chant the sevenfold prayers to unleash Nurgle’s bounty on the foe.

target.en: One **LORD OF VIRULENCE** model from your army.

effect.en: Select one objective marker within 30" of and visible to your model. Until the start of your next turn, while an enemy unit is within range of that objective marker, that unit is Afflicted.

fluff.en: Guided in by rasping jets of fumes sent up by this Lord of Virulence, plague-ridden artillery fire and airbursting spore-shells saturate the target zone.

target.en: Your **DEATH GUARD WARLORD** that is on the battlefield.

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models from your army.

fluff.en: The foul miasma around the Death Guard swells and thickens, boiling outward like putrid smog.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD VEHICLE** or **DEATH GUARD MONSTER** model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.

effect.en: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted. In addition, any enemy units that suffer mortal wounds as a result of this Stratagem are Afflicted until the start of your next turn.

fluff.en: Bloated with putrefaction and swilling with infectious poisons, the demise of this hulking entity is as revolting as it is explosively hazardous.

target.en: One **NURGLINGS** unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.

effect.en: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength and with its full wounds remaining.

fluff.en: There is no simple way to wholly cleanse a Nurgling infestation once it has taken root.

target.en: One **PLAGUE LEGIONS** unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets of ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model loses a wound, while that model’s unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit suffers 1 mortal wound after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

fluff.en: Death Guard warriors open fire into foes already embattled by Nurgle’s daemons, knowing that no matter who they hit, all will wither and rot.

target.en: One **PLAGUE LEGIONS MONSTER** unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

fluff.en: The ephemeral structures of realspace have no power to halt the onset of Nurgle’s Great Unclean Ones; they crumble, rot and burst apart before their unholy bulk.

target.en: One **PLAGUE LEGIONS** unit from your army.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, while an enemy unit is within 6" of your unit, that enemy unit is Afflicted.

fluff.en: Countless diseases blossom in the unreal flesh of Nurgle’s daemon childer, manifestations of his blessings to be spread to all.

target.en: One **PLAGUE LEGIONS** unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) is selected to Fall Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, while an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, each time that unit is selected to Fall Back, it must take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

fluff.en: Beneath the tread of Nurgle’s daemons, even ferrocrete or plasteel soon turns to a quagmire of rotting matter, in which their unlucky enemies begin to sink and become trapped.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD** unit from your army that includes two **CHARACTER** models.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Fights First ability.

fluff.en: The combined talents of these Death Guard champions drive their followers into a foam-jawed fury, be it through injection with a curdled cocktail of stimms or immersion in a fug of infectious agents.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD CHARACTER** unit from your army that is not leading a unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, before the Reinforcements step.

effect.en: Select one other friendly **DEATH GUARD** unit (excluding Battle-shocked units and Attached units that already have two Leader units or one of your **CHARACTER** units leading it) within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of your unit that your unit can lead (as described in the Leader section of its datasheet). Your unit attaches to that unit as a Leader. Change that unit’s Starting Strength accordingly.

fluff.en: Nurgle’s champions move through the Death Guard ranks like squirming parasites.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD VEHICLE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

fluff.en: As though afflicted with some awful vomiting sickness, this vehicle’s weapons retch an endless stream of fire at the enemy, heaving themselves empty even as it storms into the enemy lines.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD VEHICLE** unit from your army.

effect.en: Select one objective marker visible to one or more models in your unit. Each Afflicted enemy unit within range of that objective marker must take a Battle-shock test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

fluff.en: Swarms of these revolting insects burrow hives into the hulls of Death Guard vehicles. Drawn to sickened prey, they boil forth in buzzing masses and descend on the foe, spreading panic and horror.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD VEHICLE** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

fluff.en: Attempting to counterattack Death Guard can leave foes floundering amidst bubbling filth.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD VEHICLE** unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

fluff.en: When the armoured vehicles of the Death Guard advance, they plough through - or straight over- anything that stands in their way.

target.en: One **POXWALKERS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: After the attacking unit has fought, roll one D6 for each model from your unit that was destroyed as a result of those attacks: on a 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If your unit is not destroyed after the attacking unit has fought, enemy models destroyed as a result of this Stratagem count as enemy models destroyed by an attack made by a model in your unit for the purposes of the Curse of the Walking Pox ability.

fluff.en: Those infected by walking pox may fall as though fatally wounded, but they soon rise again.

target.en: One **POXWALKERS** unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit that made one or more attacks that targeted your unit this phase. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is Afflicted.

fluff.en: Hacking a path through a horde of Poxwalkers leaves aggressors coated in infectious matter.

target.en: One **POXWALKERS** unit from your army that is in Strategic Reserves and that is not an Attached unit.

when.en: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

fluff.en: Another wave of Poxwalkers rises from the battlefield’s carrion heaps.

target.en: That **DEATH GUARD** unit.

when.en: Your Charge phase, just after a **DEATH GUARD** unit from your army ends a Charge move.

effect.en: Each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

fluff.en: Already dismayed by this living nightmare, the enemy falters before another sudden onslaught.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one friendly **POXWALKERS** unit within 3" of your unit and visible to both your unit and the attacking unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase.just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time you would allocate an attack to a model in your **DEATH GUARD** unit, if your **POXWALKERS** unit is visible to the attacking model and is an eligible target for that attack, no saving throw is made for that attack; instead a number of **POXWALKERS** from your **POXWALKERS** unit equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack are destroyed.

fluff.en: Lacking even basic self-preservation instincts, Poxwalkers make excellent walking shields.

target.en: One **TERMINATOR** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Driven by bitterness and the putrid vitality of Nurgle’s gifts, these warriors fight on for several moments, even after death.

target.en: One **TERMINATOR** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[ASSAULT]** and **[HEAVY]** abilities.

fluff.en: Exemplifying the Daemon Primarch’s doctrines on versatile heavy infantry tactics, these warriors position themselves and let fly.

target.en: That **TERMINATOR** unit.

when.en: Your Charge phase, just after a **TERMINATOR** unit from your army ends a Charge move.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 2+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

fluff.en: Employing their crushing bulk and contagious gifts, these Terminators slam into their victims and grind them into putrefying mulch.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD VEHICLE** unit from your army.

effect.en: Select one terrain feature within 24" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next turn, enemy units are Afflicted while they are within 3" of that terrain feature.

fluff.en: Firing diseased submunitions or belching swarms of daemonic parasites from its hull, this war engine befouls the battlefield as it advances.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD CHARACTER** unit from your army.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a **DEATH GUARD** unit from your army selects that enemy unit as the target of any ranged attacks, you can re-roll the dice to determine how many attacks a weapon equipped by a model in that unit makes.

fluff.en: Unholy filth gushes from Nurgle’s faithful into their guns until the armaments threaten to burst like bloated corpses.

target.en: One **DEATH GUARD INFANTRY** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an Afflicted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Those in the grip of Nurgle’s unholy plagues become weaker by the moment, barely able to lift their weapons, let alone defend themselves from the attacking Death Guard.

target.en: One **BIOLOGUS PUTRIFIER** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and has not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit (excluding **VEHICLES**) that is within 8" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next turn, that unit has the effect of all Plagues (see Nurgle’s Gift).

fluff.en: It takes much effort and sacrifice to fashion the disgusting explosives known as death’s heads, but the results are spectacularly horrible.

target.en: That <k>Maggot Lords Deathshroud Terminators</k> unit.
target.es: Esa unidad <k>Exterminadores Sudario de Muerte Señores de los Gusanos</k>.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>Terminators du Linceul Chevaliers Vers</k>.
target.it: Quell’unità <k>Terminator Sudario Funebre dei Signori delle Larve</k>.
target.ja: その<k>マゴットロード・デスシュラウド・ターミネイター</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>蛆虫领主死亡寿衣终结者</k>单位。

when.en: Your Charge phase, when a friendly Maggot Lords Deathshroud Terminators unit starts a charge move.
when.de: Deine Angriffsphase, wenn eine befreundete Madenfürsten-Todesschleier-Terminatoren-Einheit eine Angriffsbewegung beginnt
when.es: En tu fase de carga, cuando una unidad Exterminadores Sudario de Muerte Señores de los Gusanos amiga comienza un movimiento de carga.
when.fr: À votre phase de Charge, quand une unité de Terminators du Linceul Chevaliers Vers amie commence un mouvement de charge.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Carica, quando un’unità Terminator Sudario Funebre dei Signori delle Larve amica inizia un movimento di carica.
when.ja: 自軍突撃フェイズ中、味方マゴットロード・デスシュラウド・ターミネイター・ユニットが突撃移動を開始した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 돌격 페이즈, 아군 구더기 군주들 죽음장막 터미네이터 유닛이 돌격 이동을 시작할 때.
when.zh: 您的冲锋阶段中，在一个己方蛆虫领主死亡寿衣终结者单位开始一次冲锋移动时。

effect.en: Your unit can move through models (excluding <k>MONSTER/VEHICLE</k> models).
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann sich durch Modelle bewegen (ausgenommen <k>Monster-/Fahrzeug</k>-Modelle).
effect.es: Tu unidad puede mover a través de miniaturas (salvo <k>MONSTRUO/VEHÍCULO</k>).
effect.fr: Votre unité peut se déplacer à travers les figurines (figurines de <k>Monstre/Véhicule</k> exclues).
effect.it: La tua unità può attraversare i modelli (esclusi i modelli <k>MOSTRO/VEICOLO</k>).
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは兵（<k>モンスター/ビークル</k>・兵を除く）を通り抜けて移動できる。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 모델(<k>괴수/기체</k> 모델 제외)을 통과해서 이동할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以移动穿过模型（<k>凶兽/载具</k>模型除外）。

fluff.en: Ponderous though the Deathshroud may appear, they are unrelenting in their pursuit of the enemy. Those who block their path are swept aside as if they were little more than crawling vermin.
fluff.de: Todesschleier-Terminatoren mögen auf den ersten Blick schwerfällig wirken, doch in ihrer Jagd auf den Feind kennen sie keine Atempause. Wer sich ihnen in den Weg stellt, wird wie unbedeutendes Ungeziefer beiseite gestoßen.
fluff.es: Por lentos ​​que parezcan los Sudario de Muerte, son implacables en su persecución del enemigo. Quienes bloquean su camino son barridos como si fueran poco más que alimañas reptantes.
fluff.fr: Les Terminators du Linceul semblent lourdauds, mais ils traquent l’ennemi sans relâche. Quiconque leur fait obstacle est balayé comme de la vermine rampante.
fluff.it: Malgrado l’incedere strascicato, i guerrieri del Sudario Funebre tallonano il nemico senza sosta. Chi gli sbarra la strada viene scaraventato via come fosse un misero insetto.
fluff.ja: デスシュラウドは鈍重に見えようとも、敵を追う歩みを止めることはない。その進路を阻む者は、這いまわる害獣にも等しきものとして一掃される。
fluff.ko: 죽음장막의 움직임이 일견 굼떠보일 수 있지만, 적을 쫓는 그 발걸음은 가차없다. 그 길을 가로막는 자는 바닥을 기는 해충이라도 된 것처럼 쓸려나간다.
fluff.zh: 尽管死亡寿衣终结者看上去缓慢笨拙，但他们绝不会停止追击敌人。那些阻挡他们去路的障碍会像飞虫一般被扫至一旁。

target.en: That <k>Maggot Lords Plague Marines</k> unit.
target.es: Esa unidad <k>Marines de Plaga Señores de los Gusanos</k>.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>Marines de la Peste</k> des <k>Chevaliers Vers</k>.
target.it: Quell’unità di <k>Marines della Peste dei Signori delle Larve</k>.
target.ja: その<k>マゴットロード・プレーグマリーン</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>蛆虫领主瘟疫战士</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Maggot Lords Plague Marines unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Madenfürsten-Seuchenmarine-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Marines de Plaga Señores de los Gusanos amiga se elija para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Marines de la Peste des Chevaliers Vers amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di Marines della Peste dei Signori delle Larve amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍射撃フェイズ中、味方マゴットロード・プレーグマリーン・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 구더기 군주들 플레이그 마린 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方蛆虫领主瘟疫战士单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit's Lethal Hits ranged attacks have <k>[Rapid Fire 1]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia con Impactos letales de tu unidad tienen <k>[Fuego rápido 1]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir à Touches Fatales de votre unité ont <k>[Tir Rapide 1]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro con Colpi Letali della tua unità hanno <k>[Cadenza Rapida 1]</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの［会心ヒット］の射撃攻撃は<k>［ラピッドファイア 1］</k>を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位的致命一击远程攻击拥有<k>[速射 1]</k>。

fluff.en: Retching and heaving like living things, the weapons of the Death Guard eject an overwhelming hail of projectiles, foul infectious matter and squealing parasites that saturate the ranks of the foe.
fluff.de: Die Waffen der Death Guard keuchen und verkrampfen wie lebendige Wesen, bevor sie einen überwältigenden Hagel aus Geschossen, fauligem Auswurf und wimmelnden Parasiten erbrechen, der die Reihen des Feindes flutet.
fluff.es: Tosiendo y soltando arcadas como si estuvieran vivas, las armas de la Guardia de la Muerte escupen una lluvia abrumadora de proyectiles, materia infecciosa y parásitos repulsivos que saturan las filas enemigas.
fluff.fr: Prises de spasmes comme des choses vivantes, les armes de la Death Guard éructent une grêle de projectiles infects et de parasites piaillants qui sature les rangs adverses.
fluff.it: Fetide e scosse da conati come creature viventi, le armi della Death Guard scatenano salve devastanti di proiettili, materiali infetti e parassiti che ricoprono i ranghi nemici.
fluff.ja: デスガードの武器は、まるで生き物が嘔吐するかのような射撃を繰り出す。猛烈な銃弾の嵐や穢れし感染物質、喚声を上げる寄生虫の群れなどを放ち、敵の陣列にくまなく浴びせてゆくのだ。
fluff.ko: 데스 가드의 무기는 엄청난 양의 발사체, 감염성 오물, 소리 지르는 기생충을 마치 생물체처럼 토하고 게워낸다. 적들은 이 역겨운 물질에 압도되어 무너진다.
fluff.zh: 死亡守卫的武器如同活物一样喷吐着弹药，肮脏的感染物质和蠕动的寄生虫将敌人淹没。

target.en: One friendly <k>Maggot Lords Infantry</k> unit.
target.es: Una unidad <k>Infantería Señores de los Gusanos</k> amiga.
target.fr: Une unité d’<k>Infanterie</k> des <k>Chevaliers Vers</k> amie.
target.it: Un’unità di <k>Fanteria</k> dei <k>Signori delle Larve</k> amica.
target.ja: 味方<k>マゴットロード・インファントリー</k>・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>蛆虫领主步兵</k>单位。

when.es: Al inicio de la fase de combate.
when.fr: Au début de la phase de Combat.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit engaged with your unit. That enemy unit makes a battle-shock roll.
effect.de: Wähle eine feindliche Einheit im Nahkampf mit deiner Einheit. Jene feindliche Einheit führt einen Erschütterungswurf aus.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga trabada con tu unidad. Esa unidad enemiga hace una tirada de acobardamiento.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie engagée avec votre unité. L’unité ennemie choisie fait un jet d’ébranlement.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica ingaggiata con la tua unità. Quell’unità nemica effettua un tiro per i traumi.
effect.ja: その自軍のユニットと接敵状態である敵ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットは戦闘ショックロールを行う。
effect.ko: 이 유닛과 교전 상태인 적 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 그 유닛이 전투충격 굴림을 수행합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个与您的单位处于交战状态的敌方单位。那个敌方单位进行一次战斗震慑掷骰。

fluff.en: A wave of supernatural dread and all-too-natural revulsion washes across the foe as the Death Guard approach.
fluff.de: Eine Welle widernatürlichen Schreckens und allzu natürlicher Abscheu überkommt den Feind, wenn sich die Death Guard nähert.
fluff.es: Una oleada de pavor sobrenatural y repugnancia mucho más natural invade al enemigo al ver la Guardia de la Muerte.
fluff.fr: À l’approche de la Death Guard, une vague d’effroi surnaturelle et une révulsion bien légitime affectent l’ennemi.
fluff.it: All’avvicinarsi della Death Guard i nemici vengono colti da un’ondata di terrore sovrannaturale e conati di vomito fin troppo naturali.
fluff.ja: デスガードが接近すると、妖異なる恐怖と自然の悍（ルビ、悍：おぞ）ましさが大波となって敵に押し寄せる。
fluff.ko: 데스 가드가 접근하자, 적들 사이에서 초자연적 공포와 자연적 혐오감이 동시에 분출한다.
fluff.zh: 随着死亡守卫的接近，敌人表现出了异常的恐惧和极为自然的恶心厌恶。

target.en: One friendly <k>Death Guard Character</k> unit.
target.es: 1 unidad <k>Personaje Guardia de la Muerte</k> amiga.
target.fr: Une unité de <k>Personnage</k> de la <k>Death Guard</k> amie.
target.ja: 味方<k>デスガード・キャラクター</k>・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>死亡守卫角色</k>单位。

when.es: Al inicio de la fase de mando.
when.fr: Au début de la phase de Commandement.

effect.en: Your unit has +1 OC until the end of the turn.
effect.de: Bis zum Ende des Zugs hat deine Einheit +1 MK.
effect.es: Tu unidad tiene +1 a CO hasta el final del turno.
effect.fr: Votre unité a +1 en CO jusqu’à la fin du tour.
effect.it: La tua unità ha +1 CO fino alla fine del turno.
effect.ja: そのターン終了時まで、その自軍ユニットは<k>【確】</k>に+1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 턴이 종료될 때까지 이 유닛에 장악 +1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 直到回合结束前，您的单位的 OC 属性 +1。

fluff.en: The intensive contagions that flow in abundance from this champion taint everything around them, making taking ground from them a repulsive prospect for the enemy.
fluff.de: Der intensive Befall, der im Übermaß von diesem Champion ausströmt, verdreckt alles in seiner Umgebung und macht es zu einer abstoßenden Aussicht, ihm seine Eroberungen streitig zu machen.
fluff.es: Los intensos contagios que emanan en abundancia de este campeón contaminan todo a su alrededor, convirtiendo la toma de terreno en una perspectiva repulsiva para el enemigo.
fluff.fr: Les maladies contagieuses qui émanent en abondance de ce champion affectent tout ce qui l’entoure, ce qui rend toute prise de terrain répugnante pour l’ennemi.
fluff.it: I violenti contagi emanati da questo campione corrompono tutto ciò che lo circonda, rendendo orribile la prospettiva di avvicinarsi ad esso.
fluff.ja: この闘士から溢れるおびただしい伝染病は周囲のすべてを汚染する。このようにして毒された土地は、敵にとって奪取困難な土地と化する。
fluff.ko: 막대한 전염의 기운이 이 용사로부터 뿜어져 나와 주변을 더럽히고 있다. 이들로부터 적이 영토를 취하고자 한다면 여간 곤욕스러운 일이 아닐 수 없다.
fluff.zh: 这位勇士所散发出的强烈瘟疫能够污染周边的一切，让敌人难以夺取他们所占据的领地。

target.en: That <k>Death Guard Character</k> unit.
target.es: Esa unidad <k>Personaje Guardia de la Muerte</k>.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>Personnage</k> de la <k>Death Guard</k>.
target.ja: その<k>デスガード・キャラクター</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>死亡守卫角色</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Death Guard Character unit starts an action.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Death-Guard-Charaktermodell-Einheit eine Aktion auszuführen beginnt
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Personaje Guardia de la Muerte amiga inicia una acción.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Personnage de la Death Guard amie entreprend une action.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Personaggio della Death Guard amica inizia un’azione.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方デスガード・キャラクター・ユニットがアクションを開始した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 데스 가드 캐릭터 유닛이 특수 행동을 시작할 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，在一个己方死亡守卫角色单位开始一次行动时。

effect.en: That action does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.
effect.de: Jene Aktion verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, zu schießen.
effect.es: Esa acción no impide a tu unidad ser apta para disparar.
effect.fr: Cette action n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour tirer.
effect.it: Quell’azione non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a tirare.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは、そのアクションを行った場合でも、射撃を宣言可能である。
effect.ko: 그 특수 행동에도 불구하고 그 유닛은 사격이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次行动不会阻止您的单位进行射击。

fluff.en: The worst infections spread both visibly and subtly. Thus do the Death Guard’s champions attack, ordering vile operations, the two vectors more deadly than either alone.
fluff.de: Die schlimmsten Infektionen breiten sich gleichermaßen sichtbar wie auch subtil aus. So greifen die Champions der Death Guard an, während sie zugleich scheußliche Sabotage-Akte befehlen, denn zwei Ansteckungswege sind tödlicher als jeder für sich.
fluff.es: Las peores infecciones se propagan de forma visible y sutil. Así atacan los campeones de la Guardia de la Muerte, uniendo ambos vectores para ser más letales que cualquiera de ellos por separado.
fluff.fr: Les pires infections se répandent de façon visible et subtile. Ainsi les champions de la Death Guard attaquent tout en ordonnant de viles opérations, les deux vecteurs agissant plus redoutablement que chacun pris séparément.
fluff.it: Le infezioni più spaventose si propagano sia in maniera visibile che in modo più sottile. Così agiscono i campioni della Death Guard, coordinando terribili operazioni in cui i due vettori uniti sono più pericolosi che da soli.
fluff.ja: 最も悪しき感染は目に見える形で、そして巧妙に広がっていく。その後にデスガードの闘士は邪悪な作戦を命じ、襲撃を行う。この二つの感染源は、双方が組み合わさることで壊滅的な効果を発揮するのだ。
fluff.ko: 극악한 전염병은 눈에 띄면서도 교묘히 퍼져나간다. 데스 가드의 용사들이 공세를 펼치며 악독한 작전을 명할 때도 이와 마찬가지다. 모름지기 하나보다는 두 요소가 결합한 것이 더 치명적이니.
fluff.zh: 最严重的感染既有明显的传播途径，也有隐蔽的传播途径。因此，死亡守卫的勇士们发动攻击，下令执行卑鄙的行动，这两种途径结合起来比单独使用任何一种都更加致命。

target.en: One friendly <k>Death Guard Character</k> unit.
target.es: 1 unidad <k>Personaje Guardia de la Muerte</k> amiga.
target.fr: Une unité de <k>Personnage</k> de la <k>Death Guard</k> amie.
target.ja: 味方<k>デスガード・キャラクター</k>・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>死亡守卫角色</k>单位。

when.es: Al inicio de tu fase de disparo.
when.fr: Au début de votre phase de Tir.
when.it: All’inizio della tua fase di Tiro.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段开始时。

effect.en: Select one visible enemy unit within Contagion Range of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range.
effect.de: Wähle eine für deine Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb ihrer Infektionsreichweite. Jene feindliche Einheit hat +6" Entdeckungsreichweite.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga visible para tu unidad y dentro de su alcance de contagio. Esa unidad enemiga tiene +6" al alcance de detección.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie visible et à Portée de Contagion de votre unité. L’unité ennemie choisie a +6" en portée de détection.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica visibile entro la Distanza di Contagio dalla tua unità. Quell’unità nemica ha +6" alla distanza di individuazione.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの感染範囲に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットの発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 전염 범위 내에 있으며 시야에 들어오는 적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛에 발각 범위 +6"를 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个位于您的单位感染范围内的可见敌方单位。那个敌方单位的侦测范围增加 6"。

fluff.en: There is no hiding from contagion, and particular pathogens can incite neurological paroxysms that force their victims to give away their positions in painful throes.
fluff.de: Vor der Verderbnis gibt es kein Verstecken. Bestimmte Pathogene verursachen neuronale Krämpfe, die ihre Opfer zwingen, durch schmerzerfüllte Bewegungen ihre Position zu verraten.
fluff.es: No hay forma de escapar del contagio, y ciertos patógenos pueden incitar paroxismos neurológicos que obligan a sus víctimas a revelar su posición en dolorosa angustia.
fluff.fr: On ne peut se prémunir de la contagion, et certains pathogènes peuvent induire des crises neurologiques qui forcent leurs victimes à trahir leurs positions dans d’atroces convulsions.
fluff.it: Non ci si può nascondere al contagio, e alcuni patogeni possono innescare parossismi neurologici che costringono la vittima ad abbandonare la posizione in preda a terribili spasmi.
fluff.ja: 感染からは逃れることができない。特定の病原体は神経発作を引き起こし、犠牲者は苦痛に満ちた悶絶によって、自ら秘匿位置を露わにしてしまうのだ。
fluff.ko: 전염을 피할 길은 없다. 더욱이 특정 병원체는 신경 발작을 일으켜 감염자가 극렬한 고통 속에서 자신의 자리를 내어주도록 한다.
fluff.zh: 没有任何人可以躲避病毒的感染，一些病原体甚至能够导致受害者的神经突然阵痛，让他们发出痛叫并暴露自己的位置。

target.en: That <k>Contagion Engine</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>感染兵器</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit is selected to make a fall‑back move, if that enemy unit is engaged with a friendly Contagion Engine unit.
when.de: Bewegungsphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit gewählt wird, eine Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen, und sich jene feindliche Einheit im Nahkampf mit einer befreundeten Maschinerie-der-Fäulnis-Einheit befindet
when.es: En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga se elige para hacer un movimiento de retroceder, si esa unidad enemiga está trabada con una unidad Ingenio del contagio amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité ennemie est choisie pour faire un mouvement de retraite, si elle est engagée avec une unité de Machines de Contagion amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di ripiegamento, se quell’unità nemica è ingaggiata con un’unità Macchina di Contagio amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ中、味方感染兵器・ユニットと接敵状態である敵ユニットが退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 상대의 이동 페이즈, 아군 전염 병기 유닛과 교전 상태인 유닛이 후퇴 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的移动阶段中，当一个敌方单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时，且那个单位与一个己方感染机械/k>单位处于交战状态。

effect.en:
When an enemy unit engaged with your unit is selected to make a fall‑back move, roll one D6:
  • On a 1, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
  • On a 2‑5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
  • On a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.
effect.de:
Wenn eine feindliche Einheit im Nahkampf mit deiner Einheit gewählt wird, eine Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen, wirf einen W6:
  • Bei einer 1 erleidet jene feindliche Einheit 1 tödliche Verwundung.
  • Bei 2-5 erleidet jene feindliche Einheit W3 tödliche Verwundungen.
  • Bei einer 6 erleidet jene feindliche Einheit 3 tödliche Verwundungen.
effect.es:
Cuando una unidad enemiga trabada con tu unidad se elija para hacer un movimiento de retroceder, tira 1D6:
  • Con un 1, esa unidad enemiga sufre 1 herida mortal.
  • Con 2-5, esa unidad enemiga sufre 1D3 heridas mortales.
  • Con un 6, esa unidad enemiga sufre 3 heridas mortales.
effect.fr:
Quand une unité ennemie engagée avec votre unité est choisie pour faire un mouvement de retraite, jetez un D6 :
  • Sur un résultat de 1, l’unité ennemie subit 1 blessure mortelle.
  • Sur 2‑5, l’unité ennemie subit D3 blessures mortelles.
  • Sur un résultat de 6, l’unité ennemie subit 3 blessures mortelles.
effect.it:
Quando un’unità nemica ingaggiata con la tua unità viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di ripiegamento tira un D6:
  • Con 1 quell’unità nemica subisce 1 ferita mortale.
  • Con 2-5 quell’unità nemica subisce D3 ferite mortali.
  • Con 6 quell’unità nemica subisce 3 ferite mortali.
effect.ja:
その敵ユニットと接敵状態である敵ユニットが退却移動を行った時、D6を1個ロールする：
  • ロール結果が1の場合、その敵ユニットは1ポイントの致命的ダメージを受ける。
  • ロール結果が2-5であれば、その敵ユニットはD3ポイントの致命的ダメージを受ける。
  • ロール結果が6であれば、その敵ユニットは3ポイントの致命的ダメージを受ける。
effect.ko:
이 유닛과 교전 상태인 적 유닛이 후퇴 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때 D6를 하나 굴립니다.
  • 값이 1이면, 그 적 유닛은 1 치명상을 입습니다.
  • 값이 2~5이면, 그 적 유닛은 D3 치명상을 입습니다.
  • 값이 6이면, 그 적 유닛이 3 치명상을 입습니다.
effect.zh:
在一个与您的单位处于交战状态的敌方单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时，掷一枚 D6：
  • 如果掷骰结果为 1，那个敌方单位受到 1 处致命伤。
  • 如果掷骰结果为 2-5，那个敌方单位受到 D3 处致命伤。
  • 如果掷骰结果为 6，那个敌方单位受到 3 处致命伤。

fluff.en: As courage crumbles in the face of mechanised abhorrence, then does the bloom of soulrot find purchase to spread its cyclic infection.
fluff.de: Als der Mut angesichts dieser mechanischen Abscheulichkeit zerfällt, findet die Seelenfäule Halt und breitet sich in zyklischer Infektion aus.
fluff.es: Según se desmorona el coraje ante la aversión mecanizada, la podredumbre del alma encuentra donde propagar su infección cíclica.
fluff.fr: Alors que le courage s’effondre face à une aversion mécanique, la vésanie putrescente trouve une faille pour répandre son infection Cyclique.
fluff.it: Appena il coraggio viene meno di fronte all’orrore corazzato, il germe dell’animamarcia acquisisce impeto per diffondere la sua infezione ciclica.
fluff.ja: 忌まわしき異形が機械と化した、この存在と対峙した者の勇気が崩れる時、魂腐れ病が根を下ろし、感染の循環を広げていく。
fluff.ko: 드높던 기세가 기갑화된 혐오물 앞에서 속절없이 무너지고 나면, 발아한 영혼녹이 순환의 역병을 분출한다.
fluff.zh: 在机械怪物的进攻下，勇气开始消散，灵魂腐病随之绽放，开始不断循环地感染。

target.en: That <k>Contagion Engine</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>感染兵器</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Contagion Engine unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Maschinerie-der-Fäulnis-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Ingenio del contagio amiga se elija para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Machines de Contagion amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Macchina di Contagio amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方感染兵器・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 전염 병기 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，在一个己方感染机械单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Select one visible enemy unit. That enemy unit is Afflicted until your unit has attacked.
effect.de: Wähle eine für deine Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit. Jene feindliche Einheit ist befallen, bis deine Einheit attackiert hat.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga visible. Esa unidad enemiga está afligida hasta que tu unidad haya atacado.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie visible. Cette unité ennemie est Affligée jusqu’à ce que votre unité ait attaqué.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica visibile. Quell’unità nemica è Contagiata finché la tua unità non ha attaccato.
effect.ja: 視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットは、その自軍ユニットの攻撃が終わるまでの間罹病状態となる。
effect.ko: 시야에 들어오는 적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛은 이 유닛의 공격 수행이 종료될 때까지 감염됩니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个可见敌方单位。直到您的单位完成攻击前，那个敌方单位被感染。

fluff.en: Warp‑tainted saturation oozes through this aggressive vehicle, leeching into its weapons, which spit the infection into foes at a distance.
fluff.de: Warpverseuchte Kräfte pulsieren durch dieses aggressive Fahrzeug und sickern in seine Waffen, wodurch es infektiöse Erreger auf ferne Feinde schleudern kann.
fluff.es: La contaminación de la disformidad rezuma por todo este agresivo vehículo, filtrándose en sus armas, que escupen la infección hacia los enemigos.
fluff.fr: Un mucus empyréen suinte de ce véhicule jusque dans ses armes, qui crachent leur infection sur l’ennemi.
fluff.it: Questo aggressivo veicolo gronda corruzione empyrica che s’infiltra nelle armi, che poi sputano da lontano infezioni sul nemico.
fluff.ja: この攻撃兵器は〈歪み〉汚染が飽和状態になるまで満たされており、その影響は武器にまで侵食している。そこから打ち出される弾薬は、敵に感染を撒き散らす。
fluff.ko: 워프에 물든 찐득한 물질이 이 파괴적인 기체로부터 흘러나온다. 이윽고 무기에도 들러붙어 저만치 떨어진 적에게 역병을 뱉어낸다.
fluff.zh: 受到亚空间污染的黏液流淌在这个凶残的载具中，它们吸附在武器上，能够感染远处的敌人。

target.en: That <k>Contagion Engine</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>感染兵器</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly Contagion Engine unit is selected to attack.
when.de: In deiner Fernkampfphase oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Maschinerie-der-Fäulnis-Einheit zum Attackieren gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Ingenio del contagio amiga se elige para atacar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Machines de Contagion amie est choisie pour attaquer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità Macchina di Contagio amica viene scelta per attaccare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、味方感染兵器・ユニットが攻撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 아군 전염 병기 유닛이 공격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段或在近战阶段中，当一个己方感染机械单位被选择进行攻击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s attacks can re‑roll wound rolls of 1.
effect.de: Für Nahkampfattacken deiner Einheit können Verwundungswürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
effect.es: Puedes repetir las tiradas para herir de 1 en los ataques de tu unidad.
effect.fr:
Les attaques de votre unité peuvent 
  • Relancer les jets de blessure de 1.
effect.it: Gli attacchi della tua unità possono ripetere i tiri per ferire pari a 1.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの攻撃はウーンズロールの出目1をリロールできる。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 공격은 값이 1인 타격 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位的攻击可以重掷结果为 1 的致伤掷骰。

fluff.en: As if drawn to flesh and matter yet to be blessed by corruption, infected weapons unerringly find their mark.
fluff.de: Als würden Fleisch und Materie, die noch nicht von der Verderbnis gezeichnet sind, sie wie Aasfliegen anlocken, finden infizierte Waffen unerbittlich ihr Ziel.
fluff.es: Como atraídas por la carne y la materia aún no bendecidas por la corrupción, las armas infectadas dan en el blanco con precisión.
fluff.fr: Comme attirées par la chair et la matière attendant d’être bénies par la corruption, les armes infectées trouvent leur cible de façon troublante.
fluff.it: Come se fossero attirate da carne e materia ancora vergini di corruzione, le armi infette trovano sempre il bersaglio.
fluff.ja: 未だ腐敗の祝福を受けていない肉体や物質に引き寄せられるかのように、汚染された兵器は標的を確実に見つけ出す。
fluff.ko: 감염된 무기는 귀신같이 여태 부패의 축복을 받지 않은 육신과 물체를 찾아낸다.
fluff.zh: 这些受感染的武器仿佛被尚未被祝福的血肉和物质吸引，拥有异常的精准度。

target.en: That <k>Plague Marines</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>Marines de la Peste</k>.
target.ja: その<k>プレーグマリーン</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Plague Marines unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Seuchenmarine-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Marines de Plaga amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Marines de la Peste amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di Marines della Peste amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方プレーグマリーン・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 아군 플레이그 마린 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方瘟疫战士单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s ranged attacks have <k>[Close‑quarters]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad tienen <k>[A quemarropa]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir de votre unité ont <k>[Combat Rapproché]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità hanno <k>[Ravvicinata]</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍のユニットの射撃攻撃は<k>［至近射撃］</k>を持つ。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 <k>[근접 사격]</k>을 부여합니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位的远程攻击拥有<k>[近距离]</k>技能。

fluff.en: The vermin swarms intensify as the Death Guard close in upon the enemy. As their foes clutch and tear their crawling skin, pitiless Plague Marines unleash volleys of point‑blank fire into their tormented foes.
fluff.de: Die Schwärme des Ungeziefers wogen wie von Sinnen, wenn sich die Death Guard dem Feind nähert. Während Feinde an ihrer von Insekten geplagten Haut kratzen und zerren, entfesseln die mitleidslosen Seuchenmarines Salven aus nächster Nähe.
fluff.es: Los enjambres aumentan cuando la Guardia de la Muerte se acerca al enemigo. Mientras sus enemigos tiemblan y se desgarran la piel, los despiadados Marines de Plaga acribillan a quemarropa a sus atormentados enemigos.
fluff.fr: La nuée de vermine se densifie tandis que la Death Guard se rapproche de l’adversaire. Alors que l’ennemi tourmenté se lacère la peau, les impitoyables Marines de la Peste le criblent de tirs à bout portant.
fluff.it: I parassiti aumentano man mano che la Death Guard si avvicina al nemico. Mentre gli avversari cercano di scacciarli, gli spietati Marines della Peste scatenano salve a bruciapelo sulle prede terrorizzate.
fluff.ja: 群れなす蝿は敵軍の眼前に迫ったデスガードに不浄なる活力を注入する。狂乱のあまり己が皮膚を引き裂かんばかりにもがき苦しむ敵兵に、無慈悲なるプレーグマリーンは至近距離から猛然と射撃を浴びせる。
fluff.ko: 데스 가드가 적에게 다가설수록 해충 군집은 더욱 득실댄다. 적이 가려운 피부를 마구잡이로 긁고 벗겨내는 동안 무자비한 플레이그 마린은 고통받는 적을 향해 영거리 사격을 시행한다.
fluff.zh: 随着死亡守卫的接近，虫群的行动变得更加激烈。在敌人抓挠皮肤的时候，瘟疫战士们会毫不留情地向备受折磨的敌人宣泄零距离火力。

target.en: That <k>Plague Marines</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>Marines de la Peste</k>.
target.ja: その<k>プレーグマリーン</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Plague Marines unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Seuchenmarine-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Marines de Plaga amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Marines de la Peste amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di Marines della Peste amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方プレーグマリーン・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 아군 플레이그 마린 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方瘟疫战士单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en:
Your unit’s ranged attacks:
  • Can re‑roll hit rolls of 1.
  • That target a unit within half range, can re‑roll wound rolls of 1.
effect.de:
Für die Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit können:
  • Trefferwürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
  • Verwundungswürfe von 1 wiederholt werden, wenn sich das Ziel in halber Reichweite befindet.
effect.es:
En los ataques a distancia de tu unidad se puede:
  • Repetir las tiradas para impactar de 1.
  • Repetir las tiradas para herir de 1 si toman como blanco una unidad a la mitad del alcance o menos.
effect.fr:
Les attaques de tir de votre unité :
  • Peuvent relancer les jets de touche de 1.
  • Qui ciblent une unité à demi-portée, peuvent relancer les jets de blessure de 1.
effect.it:
Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità:
  • Possono ripetere i tiri per colpire pari a 1.
  • Se hanno come bersaglio un’unità entro metà gittata, possono ripetere i tiri per ferire pari a 1.
effect.ja:
そのユニットの射撃攻撃は：
  • ヒットロールの出目1をリロールできる。
  • 攻撃対象が【射程】の半分以下の距離にいる場合、ウーンズロールの出目1をリロールできる。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 값이 1인 명중 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
  • 사거리의 절반 내에 들어온 유닛을 대상으로 지정하면, 값이 1인 타격 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh:
该己方单位的远程攻击：
  • 可以重掷结果为 1 的命中掷骰。
  • 在将一个位于攻击范围一半内的单位作为攻击目标时，攻击可以重掷结果为 1 的致伤掷骰。

fluff.en: Clouds of droning daemon flies sweep across the battlefield to envelop the enemies of the Death Guard. As their victims claw and scratch at the seething swarms, Mortarion’s sons pick off their targets at leisure.
fluff.de: Wolken brummender Dämonenfliegen schwappen über das Schlachtfeld, um die Feinde der Death Guard zu befallen. Während ihre Opfer nach den wimmelnden Schwärmen schlagen, suchen sich Mortarions Söhne in aller Ruhe ihre Ziele aus.
fluff.es: Nubes de zumbantes moscas daemónicas barren el campo de batalla y envuelven a los enemigos de la Guardia de la Muerte. Mientras sus víctimas manotean contra los enjambres, los hijos de Mortarion matan a placer.
fluff.fr: Des nuages de mouches démons balayent le champ de bataille pour envelopper les ennemis de la Death Guard. Tandis que leurs victimes tentent vainement de se débarrasser des insectes, les fils de Mortarion éliminent leurs cibles à loisir.
fluff.it: Nubi di ronzanti mosche demoniache sciamano sul campo di battaglia per avvolgere i nemici della Death Guard. Mentre le vittime cercano di difendersi, i figli di Mortarion imperversano indisturbati.
fluff.ja: この世ならぬ悪魔の蝿の大群が戦場を煙羅のごとく奔り、デスガードの敵を押し包む。犠牲者が極微の悪魔に蝕まれゆく中、モータリオンの子らは悠々と標的を屠ってゆく。
fluff.ko: 데몬 파리떼가 구름처럼 무리 지어 소란스러운 날갯짓으로 전장 곳곳에 있는 데스 가드의 적을 감싼다. 희생양이 이를 쫓아내려 버둥거리는 동안 모타리온의 아들들은 유유자적하게 사냥감을 제거한다.
fluff.zh: 大群的恶魔苍蝇在战场上飞舞，将死亡守卫的敌人包围。在敌人尝试驱赶这些害虫的时候，莫塔里安之子便能够轻松地将目标逐个消灭。

target.en: One friendly engaged Plague Marines unit.
target.fr: Une unité de Marines de la Peste amie engagée.
target.it: Un’unità di Marines della Peste amica non ingaggiata.
target.ja: 接敵状態である味方プレーグマリーン・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个处于交战状态的己方瘟疫战士单位。

when.es: Al inicio de la fase de combate.
when.fr: Au début de la phase de Combat

effect.en: Select one enemy unit engaged with your unit. That enemy unit makes a battle‑shock roll, with -1 to that battle‑shock roll.
effect.de: Wähle eine feindliche Einheit im Nahkampf mit deiner Einheit. Jene feindliche Einheit führt einen Erschütterungswurf mit -1 aus.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga trabada con tu unidad. Esa unidad enemiga hace una tirada de acobardamiento con -1 a la tirada.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie engagée avec votre unité. L’unité ennemie fait un jet d’ébranlement, avec -1 à ce jet.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica ingaggiata con la tua unità. Quell’unità nemica effettua un tiro per i traumi, con -1 a quel tiro per i traumi.
effect.ja: その自軍のユニットと接敵状態である敵ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットは戦闘ショックロールを行う。その戦闘ショックロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛과 교전 상태인 적 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛이 전투충격 굴림을 수행합니다. 그 전투충격 굴림 값에는 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个与您的单位处于交战状态的敌方单位。那个敌方单位进行一次战斗震慑掷骰，并且那次战斗震慑掷骰 -1。

fluff.en: The contagion borne by the Death Guard and their attendant swarms of winged vermin triggers bouts of sickness and convulsion in those they encounter.
fluff.de: Die Fäulnis, die die Death Guard zeichnet, und die wimmelnden Fliegenschwärme bringen ihren Widersachern überwältigende Übelkeit, die zu krampfhaftem Übergeben führt.
fluff.es: El contagio de la Guardia de la Muerte y sus enjambres de alimañas aladas desencadena ataques de enfermedad y convulsiones en todo el que se encuentran.
fluff.fr: La contagion véhiculée par la Death Guard et sa nuée de vermine volante provoque une éclosion de maladies et de convulsions chez leurs adversaires.
fluff.it: Il contagio portato dalla Death Guard e dai suoi sciami di insetti alati induce malesseri e convulsioni in chiunque li incontri.
fluff.ja: デスガードとその従者然とした有翅害虫の大群が媒介する伝染病は、感染者たちに無残な発症と痙攣の発作を引き起こす。
fluff.ko: 데스 가드와 이들이 대동하는 날개 돋친 해충 무리는 감염병을 전파하고 다니는데, 이에 노출되면 쇠약해지는 것은 물론 경련 증세마저 일어난다.
fluff.zh: 死亡守卫及其随行的成群飞虫所携带的传染病会引发与他们接触的人出现疾病和抽搐。

name.ja: 寄生する苦悶の収穫者（アップグレード）

description.en: Contagion Engine unit only. When this unit has fought, one model in this unit heals D3 wounds.
description.de: Nur für eine Maschinerie-der-Fäulnis-Einheit. Nachdem diese Einheit gekämpft hat, wird ein Modell dieser Einheit um W3 Lebenspunkte geheilt.
description.es: Solo unidad Ingenio del contagio. Cuando esta unidad haya combatido, 1 miniatura de esta unidad se cura 1D3 heridas.
description.fr: Unité de Machines de Contagion seulement. Une fois que cette unité a combattu, une de ses figurines soigne D3 points de vie.
description.it: Solo unità Macchina di Contagio. Dopo che questa unità ha combattuto, un suo modello guarisce D3 ferite.
description.ja: 感染兵器・ユニットのみ。このユニットが白兵を行った時、このユニット内の兵1体の【負傷限界】をD3ポイント回復する。
description.ko: 전염 병기 유닛 전용. 이 유닛이 백병전을 종료했을 때, 이 유닛에 속한 모델 하나가 D3 체력을 회복합니다.
description.zh: 仅限传瘟机械单位。在单位完成近战后，该单位中的一个模型治疗 D3 处耐伤。

name.fr: Lancette de la Plaie du Monde (Amélioration)
name.ja: 万病の手術刀（アップグレード）

description.en: Friendly <k>Helbrute/Myphitic Blight‑Hauler</k> unit only. This unit has <k>Mobile</k>.
description.de: Nur für eine befreundete <k>Höllenschlächter</k>-<k>/Myphitische</k>-<k>Seuchenschlepper</k>-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat <k>Mobil</k>.
description.es: Solo unidad <k>Bruto Infernal/Cargaplagas Mefítico</k> amiga. Esta unidad tiene <k>Móvil</k>.
description.fr: Unité de <k>Métabrutus/Semi-chenillé Méphitique</k> amie seulement. Cette unité a le mot-clé <k>Mobile</k>.
description.it: Solo unità di <k>Bruto Infernale/Spargimorbi Mefitico</k> amiche. Questa unità ha <k>Agile</k>.
description.ja: 味方<k>ヘルブルート/メフィティック・ブライトハウラー</k>・ユニットのみ。このユニットは<k>高機動</k>を持つ。
description.ko: 아군 <k>헬브루트/독성 마름병 운반기</k> 유닛 전용. 이 유닛에 <k>기동</k>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 仅限己方<k>地狱兽/恶臭疫病引擎</k>单位。该单位拥有<k>机动</k>关键词。

name.ja: 毒蟲の騒乱（アップグレード）

description.en: Plague Marines unit only. When this unit’s attacks target a unit within Contagion Range of a friendly unit, those attacks can re‑roll wound rolls of 1.
description.de: Nur für eine Seuchenmarine-Einheit. Wenn diese Einheit Attacken gegen eine feindliche Einheit in Infektionsreichweite einer befreundeten Einheit ausführt, können Verwundungswürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
description.es: Solo unidades Marines de Plaga. Cuando los ataques de esta unidad tomen como blanco una unidad dentro del Alcance de contagio de alguna unidad amiga, en esos ataques se pueden repetir las tiradas para herir de 1.
description.fr: Unité de Marines de la Peste seulement. Quand les attaques de cette unité ciblent une unité à Portée de Contagion d’une unité amie, ces attaques peuvent relancer les jets de blessure de 1.
description.it: Solo unità di Marines della Peste. Quando gli attacchi di questa unità hanno come bersaglio un’unità entro la Distanza di Contagio di un’unità amica, quegli attacchi possono ripetere i tiri per ferire pari a 1.
description.ja: プレーグマリーン・ユニットのみ。このユニットの攻撃が、味方ユニットの感染範囲内のユニットを攻撃対象にしている場合、それらの攻撃のウーンズロールの出目1をリロールできる。
description.ko: 플레이그 마린 유닛 전용. 아군 유닛의 전염 범위 내에 있는 대상을 이 유닛의 공격 대상으로 지정했을 때, 그러한 공격은 값이 1인 타격 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限瘟疫战士单位。在该单位对一个位于己方单位感染范围内的单位进行攻击时，您可以重掷结果为 1 的致伤掷骰。

name.ja: 疫病の帷（アップグレード）

description.en: Plague Marines unit only. This unit has -3" detection range.
description.de: Nur für eine Seuchenmarine-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat -3" Entdeckungsreichweite.
description.es: Solo unidad Marines de Plaga. Esta unidad tiene -3" al alcance de detección.
description.fr: Unité de Marines de la Peste seulement. Cette unité a -3" en portée de détection.
description.it: Solo unità di Marines della Peste. Questa unità ha -3" alla distanza di individuazione.
description.ja: プレーグマリーン・兵のみ。このユニットの発見範囲は-3mvの修正を受ける。
description.ko: 플레이그 마린 유닛 전용. 이 유닛에 발각 범위 -3"를 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限瘟疫战士单位。该单位的侦测范围减少 3"。

description.en: Death Guard Infantry model only (excluding Terminator models). Attacks that target this unit with a S greater than this unit’s T have -1 to wound rolls.
description.de: Nur für ein Death-Guard-Infanterie-Modell (ausgenommen Terminator-Modelle). Attacken gegen diese Einheit, deren S höher ist als der W dieser Einheit, haben -1 auf Verwundungswürfe.
description.es: Solo miniatura Infantería Guardia de la Muerte (salvo Exterminador). Los ataques que tomen como blanco esta unidad con una F mayor que la R de esta unidad tienen -1 a las tiradas para herir.
description.fr: Figurine d’Infanterie de la Death Guard seulement (figurines de Terminator exclues). Les attaques qui ciblent cette unité avec une F supérieure à son E ont -1 aux jets de blessure.
description.it: Solo modelli di Fanteria della Death Guard (esclusi i modelli Terminator). Gli attacchi che hanno come bersaglio questa unità e che hanno una Fo maggiore della R di questa unità hanno -1 ai tiri per ferire.
description.ja: デスガード・インファントリー・兵のみ（ターミネイター・兵を除く）。このユニットを対象とした攻撃の【攻】が、このユニットの【耐】を上回っている場合、その攻撃のウーンズロールは-1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 데스 가드 보병 모델(터미네이터 모델 제외) 전용. 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정한 공격의 위력이 이 유닛의 내구보다 높다면, 그 공격에 타격 굴림 -1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限死亡守卫步兵模型（终结者模型除外）。如果针对该单位进行的攻击的 S 属性大于该单位的 T 属性，那么攻击的致伤掷骰结果 -1。

description.en: Death Guard Infantry model only. (Once per battle, per army) In your Command phase, you can use this ability. If you do, select one of the Plagues listed in Nurgle’s Gift (see Codex: Death Guard). Enemy units within Contagion Range of this unit also have the effect of that Plague in addition to your army’s chosen Plague until the end of the battle.
description.de: Nur für ein Death-Guard-Infanterie-Modell. (Einmal pro Schlacht, pro Armee) In deiner Befehlsphase kannst du diese Fähigkeit einsetzen. Wenn du dies tust, wähle eine der Seuchen, die unter Nurgles ­Geschenke (siehe Codex: Death Guard) aufgeführt sind. Feindliche Einheiten in Infektionsreichweite dieser Einheit unterliegen zusätzlich zur gewählten Seuche deiner Armee bis zum Ende der Schlacht dem Effekt jener Seuche.
description.es: Solo miniatura Infantería Guardia de la Muerte. (Una vez por batalla, por ejército) En tu fase de mando, puedes usar esta habilidad. Si lo haces, elige 1 de las Plagas listadas en Favor de Nurgle (ver Codex: Death Guard). Las unidades enemigas dentro del alcance de contagio de esta unidad también tienen, hasta el final de la batalla, el efecto de esa Plaga además de la Plaga elegida por tu ejército.
description.fr: Figurine d’Infanterie de la Death Guard seulement. (Une fois par bataille, par armée) À votre phase de Commandement, vous pouvez utiliser cette aptitude. Dans ce cas, choisissez une des Maladies listées parmi les Bienfaits de Nurgle (voir le Codex : Death Guard). Jusqu’à la fin de la bataille, les unités ennemies à Portée de Contagion de cette unité ont également l’effet de cette Maladie en plus de la Maladie choisie pour votre armée.
description.it: Solo modelli di Fanteria della Death Guard. (Una volta per battaglia, per armata) Puoi usare questa abilità nella tua fase di Comando. Se lo fai, scegli uno dei Morbi elencati in Dono di Nurgle (vedi Codex: Death Guard). Fino alla fine della battaglia le unità nemiche entro la Distanza di Contagio di questa unità subiscono gli effetti di quel Morbo in aggiunta a quelli del Morbo scelto dalla tua armata.
description.ja: デスガード・インファントリー・兵のみ。（アーミーごとに、バトル中1回限り）自軍側指揮フェイズ中、自軍はこのアビリティを使用できる。使用した場合、『ナーグル神の恩寵』（『コデックス：デスガード』参照）に記されている疫病を1個選択する。このバトル終了時まで、このユニットの感染範囲内にいる敵ユニットは、自軍が選択した疫病に加え、ここで選択した疫病の効果も受ける。
description.ko: 데스 가드 보병 모델 전용. (군대를 통틀어 전투당 한 번) 플레이어의 지휘 페이즈에, 이 능력을 사용할 수 있습니다. 그렇게 할 경우, 너글의 은총에 수록된 질병 하나를 선택합니다(코덱스: 데스 가드 참고). 전투가 종료될 때까지 이 유닛의 전염 범위 내에 있는 적 유닛은 그 질병과 플레이어의 군대가 선택한 질병의 효과를 모두 보유합니다.
description.zh: 仅限死亡守卫步兵模型。(每支军队，每场战斗限一次）在己方指挥阶段中，您可以使用本技能。若使用，那么选择纳垢赠礼中的一个瘟疫（参见《圣典：死亡守卫》)。直到战斗结束前，除了您为军队选择的瘟疫以外，位于该单位感染范围内的敌方单位还将受到被选择瘟疫的效果影响。

description.en: Maggot Lords Tallyman model only. (Once per battle, per army) In your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets this unit, you can use this ability. If you do, this unit has Stealth.
description.de: Nur für ein Madenfürsten-Verweser-Modell. (Einmal pro Schlacht, pro Armee) Du kannst diese Fähigkeit in der Fernkampfphase deines Gegners einsetzen, wenn eine feindliche Einheit diese Einheit als Ziel wählt. Wenn du dies tust, hat diese Einheit Tarnung.
description.es: Solo miniatura Cuentaplagas Señores de los Gusanos. (Una vez por batalla, por ejército) En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga toma como blanco esta unidad, puedes usar esta habilidad. Si lo haces, esta unidad tiene Sigilo.
description.fr: Figurine d’Intendant des Chevaliers Vers seulement. (Une fois par bataille, par armée) À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie cible cette unité, vous pouvez utiliser cette aptitude. Dans ce cas, cette unité a Discrétion.
description.it: Solo modelli di Attuario dei Signori delle Larve. (Una volta per battaglia, per armata) Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, puoi usare questa abilità quando un’unità nemica sceglie come bersaglio questa unità. Se lo fai, questa unità ha Furtività.
description.ja: マゴットロード・タリーマン・兵のみ。（アーミーごとに、バトル中1回限り）自軍の射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットがこのユニットを攻撃対象として選択した時、自軍はこのアビリティを使用できる。使用した場合、このユニットは『隠密能力』を持つ。
description.ko: 구더기 군주들 집계원 모델 전용. (군대마다 전투당 한 번) 상대의 사격 페이즈에, 적 유닛이 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정하면, 이 능력을 사용할 수 있습니다. 그렇게 할 경우, 이 유닛에 스텔스를 부여합니다.
description.zh: 仅限蛆虫领主书记官模型。（每支军队，每场战斗限一次）在对手的射击阶段中，在一个敌方单位将该单位选为目标时，您可以使用本技能。若使用，该单位拥有隐匿。

description.en: Maggot Lords Lord of Virulence model only. In your Command phase, this model heals 1 wound.
description.de: Nur für ein Madenfürsten-Fürst-der-Virulenz-Modell. In deiner Befehlsphase wird dieses Modell um 1 Lebenspunkt geheilt.
description.es: Solo miniatura Señor de la Virulencia Señores de los Gusanos. En tu fase de mando, esta miniatura se cura 1 herida.
description.fr: Figurine de Seigneur de la Virulence des Chevaliers Vers seulement. À votre phase de Commandement, cette figurine soigne 1 point de vie.
description.it: Solo modelli di Signore della Virulenza dei Signori delle Larve. Nella tua fase di Comando questo modello guarisce 1 ferita.
description.ja: マゴットロード・ロード・オヴ・ヴィルレンス・兵のみ。自軍の指揮フェイズ中、この兵は【負傷限界】を1ポイント回復する。
description.ko: 구더기 군주들 독성의 군주 모델 전용. 플레이어의 지휘 페이즈에, 이 모델이 1 체력을 회복합니다.
description.zh: 仅限蛆虫领主病毒领主模型。在己方指挥阶段中，该模型治疗 1 点耐伤。

description.en: **DEATH GUARD** model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
**DEATH GUARD** model only. Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons, and the bearer’s melee weapons have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.
**DEATH GUARD** model only. While the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.
**DEATH GUARD** model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.
**DEATH GUARD** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability while targeting an Afflicted enemy unit.
**MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER** only. At the start of your Shooting phase, until the end of the phase, add 12" to the Range characteristics of the bearer’s Plague Wind weapon.
**DEATH GUARD** model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP.

**LORD OF VIRULENCE** only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly **DEATH GUARD VEHICLE** units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability, and each time one of those **VEHICLE** units makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit visible to the bearer, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

**BIOLOGUS PUTRIFIER** only. Once per battle, after the bearer’s unit has fought, if one or more **CHARACTER** models were destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy unit is Afflicted, that unit has the effect of the selected Plague in addition to any other.
**MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER** only. While an enemy unit is enfeebled by the bearer’s Pestilent Fallout ability, that unit is also Afflicted.
**PLAGUE SURGEON** only. Each time the bearer uses its Tainted Narthecium ability, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer’s unit (instead of 1).

**LORD OF POXES** only. In the Declare Battle Formations step select one Plague. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy unit is within Contagion Range of the bearer, that enemy unit has the effect of that Plague in addition to any other.

**DEATH GUARD** model only. Each time a **PLAGUE LEGIONS** unit from your army is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if it is set up wholly within 12" of the bearer, it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models, instead of more than 8".
**DEATH GUARD** model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

**GREAT UNCLEAN ONE** only. In the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of the bearer that is below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

**MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER** only. Each time a **PLAGUE LEGIONS** unit within 12" of the bearer takes a Battle-shock test, add 1 to that test and, if that test is passed, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds (if that unit is a **BATTLELINE** unit and that test is passed, up to D3 destroyed models can be returned to that unit instead).

**NOXIOUS BLIGHTBRINGER** only. While the bearer is leading a **POXWALKERS** unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit, and each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.

**DEATH GUARD** model only. If the bearer is leading a **POXWALKER** unit, and is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round as the third battle round.

**MALIGNANT PLAGUECASTER** only. While the bearer is leading a **POXWALKERS** unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s Plague Wind weapon. Each time the bearer makes one or more attacks with a Plague Wind weapon, after the bearer’s unit has resolved its attacks, D3 Bodyguard models from the bearer’s unit are destroyed.
**DEATH GUARD** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of **POXWALKERS** models in that unit.
**TERMINATOR** model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.
**TERMINATOR** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1" to the Movement characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

**TERMINATOR** model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
**TERMINATOR** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability. In addition, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.
The first time this model’s unit destroys an enemy unit as the result of a melee attack, until the end of the battle, add 6 to the Objective Control characteristic of this model.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** hyper blight grenades; injector pistol; plague knives.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Biologus Putrifiers take obscene delight in developing myriad plagues to spread in battle. They carry all manner of blight grenades, bloated with the latest strains of blossoming contagions. With their injector pistols, Biologus Putrifiers implant killing maladies into the enemy before extracting samples of their ruined flesh.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **PLAGUE MARINES**  *You can attach this model to a* **PLAGUE MARINES** *unit, even if one other Leader unit has already been attached to it (you cannot attach more than one of the same Leader to the same unit). If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.*

description.en: If this unit has a Starting Strength of 5 or more, or if a **CHARACTER** is leading this unit, then each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets an Afflicted unit, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** combi-bolter; bubotic blade.

wargear.en: If this unit contains only 3 models, 1 Blightlord Terminator’s combi-bolter and bubotic blade can be replaced with 1 plague spewer and 1 close combat weapon.
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Blightlord Terminator’s combi-bolter can be replaced with 1 plague spewer.
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Blightlord Terminator’s combi-bolter can be replaced with 1 reaper autocannon.
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Blightlord Terminator’s combi-bolter can be replaced with 1 blight launcher.
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Blightlord Terminator’s combi-bolter and bubotic blade can be replaced with 1 flail of corruption.
For every 5 models in this unit, up to 3 models’ combi-bolters can each be replaced with 1 combi-weapon.

fluff.en: Blightlord Terminators are incredibly tough, thanks to their Cataphractii armour and Nurgle’s gifts, and they are experts in breach assaults, boarding actions and sudden teleport strikes. Due to long periods spent aboard pox‑ridden warships, they are saturated with foulness, which pours off them to rot flesh and corrode metal.

description.en: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 soulshatter lascannons; twin heavy bolter; armoured tracks.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 havoc launcher.
This model can be equipped with one of the following: ◦ 1 combi-bolter ◦ 1 combi-weapon

fluff.en: Land Raiders are destructive and versatile vehicles equipped with a fearsome arsenal of weapons and a large transport capacity. Drenched in thick, stinking slime, Death Guard Land Raiders are host to various scratching and biting parasites and sprout throbbing growths emitting fogs of foetid gas.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 14 **DEATH GUARD INFANTRY** models. Each **TERMINATOR** model takes up the space of 2 models.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy **MONSTER or VEHICLE** unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if that unit is Afflicted; on a 5+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Predator twin lascannon; armoured tracks.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 havoc launcher.
This model can be equipped with one of the following: ◦ 1 combi-weapon ◦ 1 combi-bolter
This model can be equipped with one of the following: ◦ 2 lascannons ◦ 2 heavy bolters

fluff.en: The Predator Annihilator is designed for hunting enemy battle tanks, monstrous beasts and other high‑value targets. The Death Guard highly values these war engines, for they provide much‑needed fire support for their infantry assaults. Bloated with contagion and crewed by mutant abominations, these tainted war engines spread Nurgle’s gifts with every volley.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly **DEATH GUARD** unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per phase.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: These pustule‑covered battle tanks provide mobile armoured support for advancing Death Guard infantry. Maintaining a punishing rate of fire, whether lurking hull‑down or ploughing in alongside the vectorium’s warriors, they riddle the enemy with diseased munitions that leave those not immediately slain weakened and withering before the might of Mortarion’s sons.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this **TRANSPORT** this turn makes  an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.
